Skill Path: Preparedness

You have the almost uncanny ability to predict difficult situations and prepare for them.

While developing your skills in Survival you chose to focus specifically on Preparedness, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tGIXuk0XeWmG04CX]{Survey Wildlife}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Peyf3L7c9esRTsgR]{Predict Weather}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tGIXuk0XeWmG04CX]{Survey Wildlife}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Peyf3L7c9esRTsgR]{Predict Weather}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bh2jHyyYrkLMsIdX]{Prescient Planner}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lHFz4MmebvPqTb0A]{Prescient Consumable}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Vk7BzAb3D9r226sI]{Legendary Guide}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Ta61ObC8Lk7BxTFO]{Legendary Survivalist}
